Name: Agriculture and Food
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in growing crops, raising animals, harvesting timber, and harvesting fish and other animals from a farm, ranch, or their natural habitats. Food establishments transform livestock and agricultural products into products for intermediate or final consumption. The industry groups are distinguished by the raw materials (generally of animal or vegetable origin) processed into food and beverage products. The food and beverage products manufactured in these establishments are typically sold to wholesalers or retailers for distribution to consumers.

Name: Supply
Description: Facilities that supply the livestock and agricultural raw materials.

Name: Crop Production
Description: Establishments, such as farms, orchards, groves, greenhouses, and nurseries, primarily engaged in growing crops, plants, vines, or trees and their seeds.

Name: Oilseed and Grain Farm
Description: Farms engaged in growing oilseed and/or grain crops and/or producing oilseed and grain seeds. These crops have an annual life cycle and are typically grown in open fields. Includes soybeans, oilseeds, dry pea and beans, wheat, corn, oats, rice, and others.

Name: Corn Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing corn (except sweet corn) and/or producing corn seeds.

Name: Dry Pea and Bean Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing dry peas, beans, and/or lentils.

Name: Oilseed Farm (Except Soybean)
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing fibrous oilseed producing plants and/or producing oilseed seeds, such as sunflower, safflower, flax, rape, canola, and sesame.

Name: Rice Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing rice (except wild rice) and/or producing rice seeds.

Name: Soybean Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing soybeans and/or producing soybean seeds.

Name: Wheat Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing wheat and/or producing wheat seeds.

Name: Other Grain Farm (Except Wheat, Corn, and Rice)
Description: Farms primarily engaged in (1) growing grain(s) and/or producing grain seeds (except wheat, corn, and rice) or (2) growing a combination of grain(s) and oilseed(s) with no one grain (or family of grains) or oilseed (or family of oilseeds).

Name: Vegetable and Melon Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing root and tuber crops (except sugar beets and peanuts) or edible plants and/or producing root and tuber or edible plant seeds. The crops included in this group have an annual growth cycle and are grown in open fields. Climate and cultural practices limit producing areas but often permit the growing of a combination of crops in a year.

Name: Vegetable and Melon Farm (Except Potato)
Description: Farms primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) growing melons and/or vegetables (except potatoes; dry peas; dry beans; field, silage, or seed corn; and sugar beets); (2) producing vegetable and/or melon seeds; and (3) growing vegetable and/or melon bedding plants.

Name: Potato Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing potatoes and/or producing seed potatoes (except sweet potatoes).

Name: Fruit and Tree Nut Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing fruit and/or tree nut crops. The crops included are generally not grown from seeds and have a perennial life cycle. Includes citrus and non-citrus fruits and nuts.

Name: Apple Orchard
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing apples.

Name: Fruit and Nut Tree Combination
Description: Farms primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) growing non-citrus fruits (e.g., apples, grapes, berries, peaches); (2) growing tree nuts (e.g., pecans, almonds, pistachios); or (3) growing a combination of fruit(s) and tree nut(s) with no one fruit (or family of fruit) or family of tree nuts accounting for one-half of the establishments agriculture production (value of crops for market).

Name: Grape Vineyard
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing grapes and/or growing grapes to sun dry into raisins.

Name: Orange Grove
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing oranges.

Name: Berry Farm (Except Strawberry)
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing berries (except strawberries).

Name: Non-Citrus Tree and Nut Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) growing non-citrus fruits (e.g., apples, grapes, berries, peaches); (2) growing tree nuts (e.g., pecans, almonds, pistachios); or (3) growing a combination of fruit(s) and tree nut(s) with no one fruit (or family of fruit) or family of tree nuts accounting for one-half of the establishment's agriculture production (value of crops for market).

Name: Tree Nut Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing tree nuts.

Name: Citrus Grove (Except Orange)
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing citrus fruits (except oranges).

Name: Strawberry Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing strawberries.

Name: Other Non-Citrus Fruit Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing non-citrus fruits (except apples, grapes, berries, and fruit(s) and tree nut(s) combinations).

Name: Greenhouse, Nursery, or Floriculture Facility
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in growing crops of any kind under cover and/or growing nursery stock and flowers. "Under cover" is generally defined as greenhouses, cold frames, cloth houses, and lath houses. The crops grown are removed at various stages of maturity and have annual and perennial life cycles. The nursery stock includes short rotation woody crops that have growth cycles of 10 years or less.

Name: Floriculture Production Facility
Description: Production facilities/farms primarily engaged in growing and/or producing floriculture products (e.g., cut flowers and roses, cut cultivated greens, potted flowering and foliage plants, flower seeds) under cover and in open fields.

Name: Mushroom Production Facility
Description: Production facilities/farms primarily engaged in growing mushrooms under cover in mines underground, or in other controlled environments.

Name: Nursery and Tree Production Facility
Description: Production facilities/farms primarily engaged in (1) growing nursery products, nursery stock, shrubbery, bulbs, fruit stock, and sod, under cover or in open fields and/or (2) growing short rotation woody trees with a growth and harvest cycle of 10 years or less for pulp or tree stock.

Name: Other Food Crops Grown Under Cover
Description: Production facilities/farms primarily engaged in growing food crops (except mushrooms) under glass or protective cover.

Name: Tobacco, Peanut, and Other Crop Farm
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing tobacco, peanuts, cotton, hay, maple syrup, sugarcane, and sugar beet.

Name: Cotton
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing cotton.

Name: Hay
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing hay, alfalfa, clover, and/or mixed hay.

Name: Maple Sap
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing sugar maple, red maple, or black maple trees to produce sap syrup.

Name: Maple Syrup
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing sugar maple, red maple, or black maple trees to produce maple syrup.

Name: Peanut
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing peanuts.

Name: Sugar Beet
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing sugar beets.

Name: Sugarcane
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing sugarcane.

Name: Tobacco
Description: Farms primarily engaged in growing tobacco.

Name: Other Crop Farm Production
Description: Crop production facilities and assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Animal Production
Description: Facilities that raise or fatten animals for the sale of animals or animal products, and are comprised of ranches, farms, and feedlots primarily engaged in keeping, grazing, breeding, or feeding animals. The animals are generally raised in various environments, from total confinement or captivity to feeding on an open range pasture.

Name: Cattle Ranch and Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising cattle, milking dairy cattle, or feeding cattle for fattening.

Name: Beef Cattle Ranch
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in raising cattle (including cattle for dairy herd replacements).

Name: Livestock Order Buyer
Description: Livestock dealers who purchase or hold livestock (generally for up to one week) while the animals are aggregated into a large enough group to meet specific customer orders.

Name: Livestock Backgrounder
Description: Establishments that condition livestock between pasture and feedlots (generally for up to several weeks) so they will grow well in feedlots.

Name: Cattle Feedlot
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in feeding cattle prior to slaughter and processing for human consumption.

Name: Dairy Cattle Farm
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in milking dairy cattle.

Name: Dual-Purpose Cattle Ranch and Farm
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in raising cattle for both milking and meat production.

Name: Hog and Pig Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising hogs and pigs, and may include farming activities, such as breeding, farrowing, and the raising of weanling pigs, feeder pigs, or market size hogs.

Name: Pig Breed Stock
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in pig breed stock operations.

Name: Farrow Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in farrow operations.

Name: Finishing Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in finishing operations.

Name: Grower Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in grower operations.

Name: Nursery Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in nursery operations.

Name: Feeder Pig Farm Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in feeder pig farm operations.

Name: Hog Feedlot Operations (Except Stockyards for Transportation)
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in hog feedlot operations (except stockyards for transportation).

Name: Weaning Pig Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in weaning pig operations.

Name: Pig Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising pigs for fattening.

Name: Poultry or Egg Production Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in breeding, hatching, and raising poultry for meat or egg production. Includes chickens, turkeys, duck, geese, and others.

Name: Broiler Breed Stock
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in broiler breed stock operations.

Name: Chicken Egg Production
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising chickens for egg production. The eggs produced may be for use as table eggs or hatching eggs.

Name: Turkey Breed Stock
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in turkey breed stock operations.

Name: Turkey Egg Production
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising turkeys for egg production.

Name: Turkey for Meat
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising turkeys for meat.

Name: Broilers and Other Meat Type Chicken Production
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising broilers, fryers, roasters, and other meat type chickens.

Name: Poultry Hatchery
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in hatching poultry of any kind.

Name: Other Poultry Production
Description: Poultry production facilities and assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Sheep and Goat Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising sheep, lambs, and goats, or feeding lambs for fattening.

Name: Sheep Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising sheep for meat, milk, and wool production.

Name: Goat Farm
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising goats for meat, milk, and wool production.

Name: Animal Aquaculture Facility
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in the farm raising of finfish, shellfish, or any other kind of animal aquaculture, and use some form of intervention in the rearing process to enhance production, such as holding in captivity, regular stocking, feeding, and protecting from predators.

Name: Finfish Farm and Fish Hatchery
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in (1) farm-raising finfish (e.g., catfish, trout, goldfish, tropical fish, minnows) and/or (2) hatching fish of any kind.

Name: Shellfish Farm and Shellfish Hatchery
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in farm raising shellfish (e.g., crayfish, shrimp, oysters, clams, mollusks).

Name: Animal Aquaculture Facility (Except Finfish, Shellfish)
Description: Other animal aquaculture facilities and assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Other Animal Production
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in raising animals and insects (except those identified above) such as bees, horses and other equines, rabbits and other fur-bearing animals.

Name: Apiculture
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in farm-raising bees. These establishments may collect and gather honey and/or sell queen bees, packages of bees, royal jelly, bees' wax, propolis, venom, and/or other bee products.

Name: Horses and Other Equine Production
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in farm-raising horses, mules, donkeys, and other equines.

Name: Fur-Bearing Animal and Rabbit Production
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in farm-raising fur-bearing animals and rabbits.

Name: Other Animal Production (Except Apiculture, Equine or Fur-Bearing)
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in farm-raising other animal production (not apiculture, equine, or fur-bearing animal production).

Name: Forestry and Logging
Description: Facilities and operations that grow and harvest timber on a long production cycle (e.g., 10 years or more). Includes forest tract operations, forest nurseries, gathering of forest products (e.g., gum, aromatic woods), and logging (e.g., cutting of trees).

Name: Forestry
Description: Facilities and operations that grow timber on a long production cycle (e.g., 10 years or more). Includes forest tract operations, forest nurseries, gathering of forest products (e.g., gum, aromatic woods).

Name: Timber Tract Operation
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in the operation of timber tracts for the purpose of selling standing timber.

Name: Forest Nursery and Gathering of Forest Products
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in (1) growing trees for reforestation and/or (2) gathering forest products, such as gums, barks, balsam needles, rhizomes, fibers, Spanish moss, ginseng, and truffles.

Name: Logging
Description: Facilities and operations primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) cutting timber; (2) cutting and transporting timber; and (3) producing wood chips in the field.

Name: Cutting and Transporting Timber
Description: Facilities and operations primarily engaged in cutting and transporting (harvesting) of timber.

Name: Pulpwood Logging Camp
Description: Facilities and operations primarily established as logging camps engaged in cutting and transporting (harvesting) of pulpwood.

Name: Rails and Rough Wood Manufacturing
Description: Facilities and operations engaged in manufacturing rails or rough wood.

Name: Timber Piling and Pole Cutting
Description: Facilities and operations primarily engaged in the operation of timber piling and pole cutting.

Name: Tree, Stump, and Wood Chipping
Description: Facilities and operations primarily engaged in tree, stump, and wood chipping in the field.

Name: Fishing, Hunting and Trapping
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in harvesting fish and other wild animals from their natural habitats and are dependent upon a continued supply of the natural resource. The harvesting of fish is the predominant economic activity of this sub-sector and it usually requires specialized vessels that, by the nature of their size, configuration and equipment, are not suitable for any other type of production, such as transportation.

Name: Fishing Operations
Description: Harvesting of fish from their natural habitats. Usually requires specialized vessels that, by the nature of their size, configuration and equipment, are not suitable for any other type of production, such as transportation. Includes fishing for finfish, shellfish, and other marine animals.

Name: Shellfish Fishing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in the commercial catching or taking of shellfish (e.g., clams, crabs, lobsters, mussels, oysters, sea urchins, shrimp) from their natural habitat.

Name: Finfish Fishing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in the commercial catching or taking of finfish (e.g., bluefish, salmon, trout, tuna) from their natural habitat.

Name: Other Marine Fishing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in the commercial catching or taking of marine animals (except shellfish).

Name: Hunting and Trapping Operations
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) commercial hunting and trapping; (2) operating commercial game preserves, such as game retreats; and (3) operating hunting preserves.

Name: Hunting Preserve
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in operating hunting preserves.

Name: Trapping Preserve
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in operating trapping preserves.

Name: Fishing Preserve
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in operating fishing reserves.

Name: Game Propagation
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in operations for game propagation.

Name: Game Retreat
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in operating game retreats.

Name: Processing, Packaging, and Production
Description: Facilities associated with the transformation of livestock and agricultural products into products for intermediate or final consumption. This category is sometimes referred to as Food Manufacturing.

Name: Animal Food Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing food and feed for animals from ingredients, such as grains, oilseed mill products, and meat products. These products are not intended for human consumption.

Name: Farm Animal Feed Manufacturing
Description: Facilities associated with the manufacturing of feed for cattle, hogs, pigs, poultry, aquaculture fish, and other farm animals. Includes grain and meat feed, supplements, concentrates, mixes, and other animal feed.

Name: On-Farm Site Feed Manufacturing
Description: Establishments located at animal raising operations that produce animal feed intended primarily for local consumption.

Name: Off-Farm Site Feed Manufacturing
Description: Establishments located apart from animal raising operations that produce animal feed intended primarily for general sale.

Name: Pet Food Manufacturing
Description: Facilities associated with manufacturing of food for household pets (e.g., dogs, cats, gerbils, hamsters, aquarium fish). Includes grain and meat feed, supplements, concentrates, mixes, and other pet food.

Name: Dog and Cat Food Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing dog and cat food from ingredients, such as grains, oilseed mill products, and meat products.

Name: Animal Feeds Manufacturing (Except Dog and Cat)
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing pet food (except dog and cat food) from ingredients, such as grains, oilseed mill products, and meat products.

Name: Grain and Oilseed Milling
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) milling flour or meal from grains or vegetables; (2) preparing flour mixes or doughs from flour milled in the same establishment; (3) milling, cleaning, and polishing rice; and (4) manufacturing malt from barley, rye, or other grains.

Name: Flour Milling and Malt Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) wet milling corn and vegetables; (2) crushing oilseeds and tree nuts; (3) refining and/or blending vegetable oils; (4) manufacturing shortening and margarine; and (5) blending purchased animal fats with vegetable fats.

Name: Flour Milling
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in (1) milling flour or meal from grains (except rice) or vegetables and/or (2) milling flour and preparing flour mixes or doughs.

Name: Rice Milling
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in one of the following: (1) milling rice; (2) cleaning and polishing rice; or (3) milling, cleaning, and polishing rice. The establishments in this industry may package the rice they mill with other ingredients

Name: Malt Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing malt from barley, rye, or other grains.

Name: Starch, Vegetable Fat, and Oil Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) wet milling corn and vegetables; (2) crushing oilseeds and tree nuts; (3) refining and/or blending vegetable oils; (4) manufacturing shortening and margarine; and (5) blending purchased animal fats with vegetable fats.

Name: Wet Corn Milling
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in wet milling corn and other vegetables (except to make ethyl alcohol). Examples of products made in these establishments are corn sweeteners, such as glucose, dextrose, and fructose; corn oil; and starches (except laundry).

Name: Soybean Processing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in crushing soybeans. Examples of products produced in these establishments are soybean oil, soybean cake and meal, and soybean protein isolates and concentrates.

Name: Other Oilseed Processing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in crushing oilseeds (except soybeans) and tree nuts, such as cottonseeds, linseeds, peanuts, and sunflower seeds.

Name: Fats and Oils Refining and Blending
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) manufacturing shortening and margarine from purchased fats and oils; (2) refining and/or blending vegetable, oilseed, and tree nut oils from purchased oils; and (3) blending purchased animal fats with purchased vegetable fats.

Name: Breakfast Cereal Manufacturing
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing breakfast cereal foods.

Name: Corn, Farina, and Grain Breakfast Cereal Manufacturing
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing corn, farina, and grain breakfast cereal foods.

Name: Grain Mills, Breakfast Cereal
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing flour and grain mills breakfast cereal foods.

Name: Infant Cereal, Dry Manufacturing
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing dry infant cereal foods.

Name: Instant Hot Cereal Manufacturing
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing instant hot cereal foods.

Name: Cereal and Grain Bar
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing cereal and grain bars.

Name: Sugar and Confectionary Product Manufacturing
Description: Establishments that process agricultural inputs, such as sugarcane, beet, and cacao, to give rise to a new product (sugar or chocolate), and those that begin with sugar and chocolate and process these further.

Name: Sugar Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing raw sugar, liquid sugar, and refined sugar from sugarcane, raw cane sugar and sugar beets.

Name: Sugarcane Mill
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in processing sugarcane.

Name: Sugarcane Refining
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in refining cane sugar from raw cane sugar.

Name: Beet Sugar Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing refined beet sugar from sugar beets.

Name: Confectionary Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing confectioneries. Includes chocolate and non-chocolate confectionaries.

Name: Chocolate and Confectionary Manufacturing from Cacao Beans
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in shelling, roasting, and grinding cacao beans and making chocolate cacao products and chocolate confectioneries.

Name: Confectionary Manufacturing from Purchased Chocolate
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing chocolate confectioneries from chocolate produced elsewhere. Included in this industry are establishments primarily engaged in retailing chocolate confectionery products not for immediate consumption made on the premises from chocolate made elsewhere.

Name: Non-Chocolate Confectionary Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing non-chocolate confectioneries. Included in this industry are establishments primarily engaged in retailing non-chocolate confectionery products not for immediate consumption made on the premises.

Name: Fruit/Vegetable Preserving, Specialty Food Manufacturing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing canned, pickled, and dried fruits, vegetables, and specialty foods. Establishments in this industry may package the dried or dehydrated ingredients they make with other purchased ingredients. Examples of products made by these establishments are canned juices, canned baby foods, canned soups (except seafood), canned dry beans, canned tomato-based sauces, such as catsup, salsa, chili, spaghetti, barbeque, and tomato paste, pickles, relishes, jams and jellies, dried soup mixes and bullions, and sauerkraut.
CrosssectorReference: 18.2.4 Fruit/Vegetable Preserving, Specialty Food Manufacturing Facility

Name: Frozen Food Manufacturing Facility
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing frozen fruit, frozen juices, frozen vegetables, and frozen specialty foods (except seafood), such as frozen dinners, entrees, and side dishes, frozen pizza, frozen whipped toppings, and others.

Name: Frozen Fruit, Juice and Vegetable Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing frozen fruits; frozen vegetables; and frozen fruit juices, ades, drinks, cocktail mixes and concentrates.

Name: Frozen Specialty Food Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing frozen specialty foods (except seafood), such as frozen dinners, entrees, and side dishes; frozen pizza; frozen whipped topping; and frozen waffles, pancakes, and french toast.

Name: Fruit and Vegetable Canning, Pickling, Drying
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing canned, pickled, and dried fruits, vegetables, and specialty foods, and may package the dried or dehydrated ingredients they make with other purchased ingredients. Examples of products made in these facilities are canned juices, canned baby foods, canned soups (except seafood), canned dry beans, canned tomato-based sauces, pickles, relishes, jams and jellies, dried soup mixes and bullions, and others.

Name: Fruit and Vegetable Canning
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing canned, pickled, and brined fruits and vegetables. Examples of products made in these establishments are canned juices; canned jams and jellies; canned tomato-based sauces, such as catsup, salsa, chili, spaghetti, barbeque, and tomato paste; pickles, relishes, and sauerkraut.

Name: Specialty Canning
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing canned specialty foods. Examples of products made in these establishments are canned baby food, canned baked beans, canned soups (except seafood), canned spaghetti, and other canned nationality foods.

Name: Dried and Dehydrated Food Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in (1) drying (including freeze-dried) and/or dehydrating fruits, vegetables, and soup mixes and bouillon and/or (2) drying and/or dehydrating ingredients and packaging them with other purchased ingredients, such as rice and dry pasta.

Name: Dairy Product Manufacturing (Except Frozen)
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing dairy products from raw milk and/or processed milk products, manufacturing dairy substitutes from soybeans and other non-dairy substances, and manufacturing dry, condensed, concentrated, and evaporated dairy and dairy substitute products.

Name: Fluid Milk Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in (1) manufacturing processed milk products, such as pasteurized milk or cream and sour cream and/or (2) manufacturing fluid milk dairy substitutes from soybeans and other non-dairy substances.

Name: Acidophilus Milk Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing acidophilus milk.

Name: Milk Based Beverage Manufacturing (Except Dietary)
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing milk based beverages (except dietary).

Name: Other Fluid Milk Manufacturing
Description: Other fluid milk manufacturing facilities not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Creamery Butter Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing creamery butter from milk and/or processed milk products.

Name: Anhydrous Butterfat Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing anhydrous butterfat.

Name: Butter Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing butter.

Name: Whey Butter Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing whey butter.

Name: Cheese Manufacturing
Description: Facilities engaged in manufacturing cheese products.

Name: Cheese Manufacturing (Except Cottage Cheese)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing cheese (except cottage cheese).

Name: Cheese Products Manufacturing (Imitation or Substitute)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing imitation or substitute cheese products.

Name: Dips, Spreads, Cheese Based, Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing cheese-based dips and spreads.

Name: Curds and Cheese, Made in a Cheese Plant, Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing curds and cheese made in a cheese plant.

Name: Processed Cheese Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing processed cheese.

Name: Whey Manufacturing (Raw or Liquid)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing raw or liquid whey.

Name: Dry, Condensed, and Evaporated Dairy Product Manufacturing
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing dry, condensed, and evaporated dairy products.

Name: Baby Formula Manufacturing (Fresh, Processed, and Bottled)
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing fresh, processed, and bottled baby formula.

Name: Dietary Drink Manufacturing (Dairy and Non-dairy Based)
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing dairy and non-dairy based dietary drinks.

Name: Ice Cream and Frozen Dessert Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing ice cream, frozen yogurts, frozen ices, sherbets, frozen tofu, and other frozen dairy desserts.

Name: Dairy-Based Frozen Dessert Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing dairy-based ice cream, frozen yogurts, sherbets, and other frozen dairy desserts.

Name: Ice Cream Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing dairy-based ice cream.

Name: Frozen Custard Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing dairy-based frozen custard.

Name: Ice Milk Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing dairy-based ice milk.

Name: Ice Cream Specialties Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing ice cream specialties.

Name: Sherbet Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing dairy-based sherbet.

Name: Non-Dairy Based Frozen Dessert Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing non-dairy based ice cream, frozen yogurts, frozen ices, sherbets, frozen tofu, and other frozen dairy desserts.

Name: Ice Cream Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing non-dairy based ice cream.

Name: Tofu Frozen Desserts Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing non-dairy based tofu frozen desserts.

Name: Fruit Pops, Frozen, Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing non-dairy based frozen fruit pops.

Name: Fruit-Flavored Ices
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing non-dairy based fruit-flavored ices.

Name: Animal Slaughtering and Processing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) slaughtering animals; (2) preparing processed meats and meat byproducts; and (3) rendering and/or refining animal fat, bones, and meat scraps. This category includes establishments primarily engaged in assembly, cutting, and packing of meats (e.g., boxed meats) from purchased carcasses.

Name: Animal Slaughtering (Except Poultry)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering animals (except poultry and small game) and processing and preparing meats.

Name: Beef Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering beef.

Name: Pork Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering pork.

Name: Lamb/Goat Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering lamb/goat.

Name: Veal Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering veal.

Name: Horsemeat Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering horsemeat.

Name: Custom Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering animals in a custom harvesting facility.

Name: Meat Processing/Packing (Except Poultry)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing or preserving meat and meat byproducts (except poultry and small game) from purchased meats. This industry includes establishments primarily engaged in assembly cutting and packing of meats (i.e., boxed meats) from purchased meats.

Name: Beef Meat Processed from Carcasses
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing or preserving beef meat from carcasses.

Name: Pork Meat Processed from Carcasses
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing or preserving pork meat from carcasses.

Name: Lamb/Goat Meat Processed from Carcasses
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing or preserving lamb/goat meat from carcasses.

Name: Veal Meat Processed from Carcasses
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing or preserving veal meat from carcasses.

Name: Rendering and Meat By-Product Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing, preserving, or rendering meat by-products.

Name: Poultry Processing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in (1) slaughtering poultry and small game and/or (2) preparing processed poultry and small game meat and meat byproducts.

Name: Chicken Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering chicken.

Name: Duck/Geese Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering duck/geese.

Name: Turkey Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering turkey.

Name: Rabbit Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering rabbits.

Name: Wild Game Slaughtering Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in slaughtering wild game.

Name: Chicken Processing/Packing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing, preserving, or packing chicken.

Name: Duck/Geese Processing/Packing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing, preserving, or packing duck/geese.

Name: Turkey Processing/Packing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing, preserving, or packing turkey.

Name: Rabbit Processing/Packing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing, preserving, or packing rabbits.

Name: Wild Game Processing/Packing Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing, preserving, or packing wild game.

Name: Poultry Processing (Canned, Cooked, Fresh, Frozen)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in processing poultry (canned, cooked, fresh, frozen).

Name: Seafood Product Preparation and Packaging
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) canning seafood (including soup); (2) smoking, salting, and drying seafood; (3) eviscerating fresh fish by removing heads, fins, scales, bones, and entrails; (4) shucking and packing fresh shellfish; (5) processing marine fats and oils; and (6) freezing seafood. Includes establishments known as "floating factory ships" that are engaged in the gathering and processing of seafood into canned seafood products.

Name: Seafood Canning
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in canning seafood (including soup) and marine fats and oils and/or smoking, salting, and drying seafood. This includes packaging and processing facilities.

Name: Cannery, Fish
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in canning fish.

Name: Cannery, Shellfish
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in canning shellfish.

Name: Canning, Fish, Crustacea, and Mollusks
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in canning fish, crustacea, and mollusks.

Name: Cod Liver Oil Extraction, Crude, Produced in a Cannery
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in extracting, producing, and canning crude cod liver oil.

Name: Drying or Curing Fish or Seafood
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in drying and curing fish and seafood.

Name: Floating Factory Ships Seafood Processing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in processing seafood in floating factory ships.

Name: Seaweed Processing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in processing seaweed.

Name: Other Seafood Canning
Description: Other seafood canning facilities or assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Fresh and Frozen Seafood Processing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in eviscerating fresh fish by removing heads, fins, scales, bones, and entrails, shucking and packing fresh shellfish, manufacturing frozen seafood, and processing fresh and frozen marine fats and oils.

Name: Seafood Products, Fresh Prepared, Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing prepared fresh seafood products.

Name: Seafood Products, Frozen, Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing prepared frozen seafood products.

Name: Shellfish Products, Fresh Prepared, Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing prepared fresh shellfish products.

Name: Shellfish Products, Frozen, Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing prepared frozen shellfish products.

Name: Cod Liver Oil Extraction, Crude, Produced in a Fresh and Frozen Seafood Plant
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in extracting and producing crude cod liver oil in a fresh and frozen seafood plant.

Name: Bakery and Tortilla Manufacturing
Description: Establishments producing bakery products. Includes breads, cakes, cookies, crackers, pastas, tortillas, flour mixes, and similar products.

Name: Bread and Bakery Product Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing fresh and frozen bread and other bakery products.

Name: Retail Bakery
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in retailing bread and other bakery products not for immediate consumption. Made on the premises from flour, not from prepared dough.

Name: Commercial Bakery
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing fresh and frozen bread and bread-type rolls and other fresh bakery (except cookies and crackers) products.

Name: Frozen Cakes, Pies and Other Pastries Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing frozen bakery products (except bread), such as cakes, pies, and doughnuts.

Name: Cookie, Cracker and Pasta Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in one of the following: (1) manufacturing cookies and crackers; (2) preparing flour and dough mixes and dough from flour ground elsewhere; and (3) manufacturing dry pasta. The establishments in this industry may package the dry pasta they manufacture with other ingredients.

Name: Cookie and Cracker Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing cookies, crackers, and other products, such as ice cream cones.

Name: Flour Mixes and Dough Manufacturing from Purchased Flour
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing prepared flour mixes or dough mixes from flour ground elsewhere.

Name: Dry Pasta Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing dry pasta. The establishments in this industry may package the dry pasta they manufacture with other ingredients.

Name: Other Bakery Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing tortillas, croutons, breading, stuffing, and other bakery component products.

Name: Tortilla and other Corn-Based Bakery Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing tortillas.

Name: Rice-Based Other Bakery Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing rice-based bakery products.

Name: Wheat-Based Breading and Other Bakery Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing wheat-based breading and bakery products.

Name: Snacks, Condiments, Spices, Seasoning and Other Food Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing food (except animal food grain, oilseed milling, sugar and confectionery products, preserved fruit, vegetable, specialty foods, dairy products, meat products, seafood products, bakeries, and tortillas). Includes industries with different production processes, such as snack food manufacturing, coffee and tea manufacturing, concentrate, syrup, condiment, spice manufacturing, and other miscellaneous food product manufacturing.

Name: Snack Food Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in salting, roasting, drying, cooking, or canning nuts, manufacturing peanut butter, processing grains or seeds into snacks, and manufacturing potato chips, corn chips, popped popcorn, pretzels (except soft), pork rinds, and similar snacks.

Name: Roasted Nuts and Peanut Butter Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing roasted nuts and peanut butter.

Name: Chips and Other Snack Food Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing chips and other snack food not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Coffee and Tea Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in roasting coffee, manufacturing coffee and tea concentrates (including instant and freeze-dried), blending tea, manufacturing herbal tea, and manufacturing coffee extracts, flavorings, and syrups.

Name: Coffee Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in roasting coffee or manufacturing coffee concentrates, extracts, coffee-based syrups, coffee substitutes, and/or instant and freeze-dried coffee.

Name: Tea Manufacturing
Description: Facilities primarily engaged in manufacturing tea, herbal tea, instant tea, and tea blending.

Name: Flavoring Syrup and Concentrate Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing flavoring syrup drink concentrates and related products for soda fountain use or for the manufacture of soft drinks.

Name: Flavoring Pastes, Powders, and Syrups for Soft Drink Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing flavoring pastes, powders, and syrups (except coffee-based).

Name: Syrup, Flavoring Manufacturing (Except Coffee Based)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing syrups (except coffee-based).

Name: Concentrates, Flavoring Manufacturing (Except Coffee Based)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing flavoring concentrates (except coffee-based).

Name: Concentrates, Drink Manufacturing  (Except Frozen Fruit Juice)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing drink concentrates (except frozen fruit juice).

Name: Seasoning and Dressing Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) manufacturing dressings and sauces, such as mayonnaise, salad dressing, vinegar, mustard, horseradish, soy sauce, tartar sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and other prepared sauces (except tomato-based and gravies); (2) manufacturing spices, table salt, seasoning, and flavoring extracts (except coffee and meat), and natural food colorings; and (3) manufacturing dry mix food preparations, such as salad dressing mixes, gravy and sauce mixes, frosting mixes, and other dry mix preparations.

Name: Mayonnaise, Dressing, and Other Prepared Sauce Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing mayonnaise, salad dressing, vinegar, mustard, horseradish, soy sauce, tartar sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and other prepared sauces (except tomato-based and gravy).

Name: Spice and Extract Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in (1) manufacturing spices, table salt, seasonings, flavoring extracts (except coffee and meat), and natural food colorings and/or (2) manufacturing dry mix food preparations, such as salad dressing mixes, gravy and sauce mixes, frosting mixes, and other dry mix preparations.

Name: Perishable Prepared Food Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing perishable prepared foods, such as salads, sandwiches, prepared meals, fresh pizza, fresh pasta, and peeled or cut vegetables.

Name: Other Food Product Manufacturing
Description: Other food product manufacturing facilities and assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Beverage and Ice Manufacturing
Description: Establishments that produce (1) non-alcoholic beverages; (2) alcoholic beverages through the fermentation process; and (3) distilled alcoholic beverages. Ice manufacturing, while not a beverage, is included with non-alcoholic beverage manufacturing because it uses the same production process as water purification.

Name: Soft Drink Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing soft drinks and artificially carbonated waters.

Name: Beverages, Fruit and Vegetable Drinks, Cocktails and Ades, Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing fruit and vegetable drinks, cocktails, and ades.

Name: Carbonated Drinks Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing carbonated drinks.

Name: Flavored Water Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing flavored water.

Name: Water, Artificially Carbonated, Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing artificially carbonated water.

Name: Iced Coffee and Tea Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing iced coffee and tea.

Name: Fruit Juice Manufacturing (Except Drinks)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing fresh fruit and vegetable juices (except drinks).

Name: Bottled Water Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in purifying and bottling water (including naturally carbonated).

Name: Spring Water, Purifying and Bottling
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in purifying and bottling spring water.

Name: Water, Naturally Carbonated, Purifying and Bottling
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in purifying and bottling naturally carbonated water.

Name: Ice Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing ice. This includes packaging and processing facilities.

Name: Block Ice Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing block ice.

Name: Ice Manufacturing (Except Dry Ice)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing ice (except dry ice).

Name: Alcoholic Beverage Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing alcoholic beverages.

Name: Brewery
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in brewing beer, ale, and malt liquors.

Name: Winery
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in growing grapes and manufacturing wine and brandies, manufacturing wine and brandies from grapes and other fruits grown elsewhere, and blending wines and brandies.

Name: Distillery
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in distilling potable liquors, distilling and blending liquors, and blending and mixing liquors and other ingredients.

Name: Tobacco Product Manufacturing
Description: Establishments engaged in the stemming and redrying of tobacco and the manufacturing of tobacco products including cigarettes, cigars, pipe tobacco, and similar products.

Name: Stemming and Redrying of Tobacco
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in stemming and redrying of tobacco.

Name: Stemming of Tobacco
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in stemming tobacco.

Name: Drying of Tobacco
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in drying and redrying of tobacco.

Name: Manufacturing of Tobacco Product
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing tobacco products.

Name: Manufacturing of Cigarette Product
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing cigarette products.

Name: Manufacturing of Cigar Product
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing cigar products.

Name: Manufacturing of Pipe Tobacco Product
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing pipe tobacco products.

Name: Other Tobacco Product Manufacturing (Not Cigarette, Cigar, or Pipe Tobacco)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing tobacco products other than cigarette, cigar, or pipe tobacco.

Name: Agriculture and Food Product Storage and Distribution Warehouse
Description: Establishments engaged in operating warehousing and storage facilities for domestic and imported agricultural and food products. These establishments provide facilities to store goods. They do not sell the goods they handle. These establishments take responsibility for storing the goods and keeping them secure. They may also provide a range of services, often referred to as logistics services, related to the distribution of goods.

Description: Establishments primarily engaged in operating warehousing and storage facilities for domestic bulk food (e.g., grains, unprocessed vegetables and fruits). Includes grain elevators. Facilities may be refrigerated or unrefrigerated.

Name: Agricultural and Food Product Transportation
Description: Establishments engaged in transporting agricultural and food products. These establishments provide facilities to store goods.

Name: Road Transport of Domestic and Imported Agricultural Products, Food Products, and Animals
Description: Transportation facilities (e.g., trucks, truck terminals, truck wash and disinfection facilities, highways, bridges, tunnels) involved in the transport of agricultural products, food products, and animals by land.

Name: Road Transport System for Domestic Agricultural Products, Food Products, and Animals
Description: Transportation facilities (e.g., trucks, truck terminals, truck wash and disinfection facilities, highways, bridges, tunnels) involved in the transport of domestic agricultural products, food products, and animals by land.

Description: Facilities engaged in the inspection of domestic agricultural products, food products, and animals traveling by land.

Name: Truck Stop

Description: Aircraft involved in the transport of non-refrigerated imported agricultural and food products by air.

Name: Air Transport of Imported Animals
Description: Aircraft involved in the transport of imported animals by air.

Name: Agricultural and Food Product Distribution
Description: Facilities associated with the wholesale and retail distribution of agricultural and food products.

Name: Farm Product Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of agricultural products such as grains, field beans, livestock, and other farm product raw materials (excluding seeds).

Name: Grain and Field Bean Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of grains, such as corn, wheat, oats, barley, and unpolished rice, dry beans, soybeans, and other inedible beans.

Name: Distribution Warehouse Corn
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of corn.

Name: Distribution Warehouse Grain
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of grains (except corn and soybeans).

Name: Distribution Warehouse Soybeans
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of soybeans.

Name: Livestock Market
Description: Establishments that receive, hold, and sell livestock (e.g., cattle, sheep, swine, horses, llamas, bison) to all entities within the production chain (from ranchers, to backgrounders, to feedlots) and to processing (slaughter) facilities.

Name: Sale Barn Beef
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of barn beef.

Name: Sale Barn Lamb/Goat
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of barn lamb/goat.

Name: Sale Barn Swine
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of barn swine.

Name: Other Farm Product Wholesaler
Description: Farm product wholesaler facilities and assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Distribution Warehouse Cotton
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the distribution of warehouse cotton.

Name: Distribution Warehouse Eggs
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the distribution of warehouse eggs.

Name: Grocery and Related Product Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of a general line (wide range) of groceries. Includes general line groceries, packaged frozen foods, dairy products, poultry products, confectionaries, fish and seafood products, meat and meat products, fresh fruits and vegetables, and others.

Name: General Line Grocery Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of a general line (wide range) of groceries.

Name: Packaged Frozen Food Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of packaged frozen foods (except dairy products).

Name: Dairy Product Merchant Wholesaler (Except Dried or Canned)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of dairy products (except dried or canned).

Name: Poultry and Poultry Product Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of poultry and/or poultry products (except canned and packaged frozen).

Name: Confectionery Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of confectioneries; salted or roasted nuts; popcorn; potato, corn, and similar chips; and/or fountain fruits and syrups.

Name: Fish and Seafood Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of fish and seafood (except canned or packaged frozen).

Name: Meat and Meat Product Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of meats and meat products (except canned and packaged frozen) and/or lard.

Name: Fresh Fruit and Vegetable Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of fresh fruits and vegetables.

Name: Other Grocery and Related Products Merchant Wholesaler
Description: Other grocery and related product wholesalers not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Food and Beverage Store
Description: Establishments retailing food and beverage merchandise from fixed point-of-sale locations. Generally have special equipment (e.g., freezers, refrigerated display cases, refrigerators) for displaying food and beverage goods. Staff are generally trained in the processing of food products to guarantee the proper storage and sanitary conditions required by regulatory authority.

Name: Grocery Store
Description: Establishments, generally known as supermarkets, grocery stores and convenience stores, primarily engaged in retailing a general line of food, such as canned and frozen foods, fresh fruits and vegetables, and fresh and prepared meats, fish, and poultry. Included are delicatessen-type establishments primarily engaged in retailing a general line of food.

Name: Supermarket and Other Grocery Store (Except Convenience)
Description: Establishments generally known as supermarkets and grocery stores, primarily engaged in retailing a general line of food, such as canned and frozen foods; fresh fruits and vegetables; and fresh and prepared meats, fish, and poultry. Included in this industry are delicatessen-type establishments primarily engaged in retailing a general line of food.

Name: Convenience Store
Description: Establishments known as convenience stores or food marts primarily engaged in retailing a limited line of goods that generally includes milk, bread, soda, and snacks. May be co-located with a motor vehicle refueling station.

Name: Specialty Food Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing specialized lines of food. Includes meat markets, fish and seafood markets, fruit and vegetable markets, baked goods stores, and others.

Name: Meat Market
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing fresh, frozen, or cured meats and poultry. Delicatessen-type establishments primarily engaged in retailing fresh, frozen, or cured meats and poultry. Delicatessen-type establishments primarily engaged in retailing fresh meat are included in this industry.

Name: Fish and Seafood Market
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing fresh, frozen, or cured fish and seafood products.

Name: Fruit and Vegetable Market
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing fresh fruit and vegetables.

Name: Baked Goods Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing baked goods not for immediate consumption and not made on the premises.

Name: Confectionery and Nut Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing candy and other confections, nuts, and popcorn not for immediate consumption and not made on the premises.

Name: Other Specialty Food Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing miscellaneous specialty foods (except meat, fish, seafood, fruit and vegetables, confections, nuts, popcorn, and baked goods) not for immediate consumption and not made on the premises.

Name: Beer, Wine, and Liquor Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing packaged alcoholic beverages, such as ale, beer, wine, and liquor.

Name: General Merchandise Store
Description: Facilities that retail new general merchandise from fixed point-of-sale locations. Establishments are unique in that they have the equipment and staff capable of retailing a large variety of goods from a single location. This includes a variety of display equipment and staff trained to provide information on many lines of products.

Name: Department Store
Description: Establishments that have separate departments for various merchandise lines, such as apparel, jewelry, home furnishings, and linens, each with separate cash registers and sales associates. Department stores in this industry generally do not have central customer checkout and cash register facilities.

Name: Other General Merchandise Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing new goods in general merchandise stores (except department stores).

Name: Warehouse Club and Supercenter
Description: Establishments known as warehouse clubs, superstores, or supercenters primarily engaged in retailing a general line of groceries in combination with general lines of new merchandise, such as apparel, furniture, and appliances.

Name: All Other General Merchandise Store
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing new goods in general merchandise stores (except department stores, warehouse clubs, superstores, and supercenters). These establishments retail a general line of new merchandise, such as apparel, automotive parts, dry goods, hardware, groceries, housewares or home furnishings, and other lines in limited amounts, with none of the lines predominating.

Name: Non-Store Retailer
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing merchandise using methods, such as the broadcasting of infomercials, the broadcasting and publishing of direct-response advertising, the publishing of paper and electronic catalogs, door-to-door solicitation, in-home demonstration, selling from portable stalls and distribution through vending machines. Establishments include mail-order houses, vending machine operators, home delivery sales, door-to-door sales, party plan sales, electronic shopping, and sales through portable stalls (e.g., street vendors). Establishments engaged in the direct (i.e., non-store) sale of products are included.

Name: Electronic Shopping and Mail-Order House
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing all types of merchandise using non-store means, such as catalogs, toll-free telephone numbers, or electronic media, such as interactive television or computer. Included in this industry are establishments primarily engaged in retailing from catalog showrooms or mail-order houses.

Name: Vending Machine Operator
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing merchandise through vending machines that they service.

Name: Direct Selling Establishment
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in non-store retailing (except electronic, mail-order, or vending machine sales). These establishments typically go to the customer's location rather than the customer coming to them (e.g., door-to-door sales, home parties). Examples of establishments in this industry are locker meat provisioners; frozen food and freezer plan providers; coffee-break services providers; and bottled water or water softener services.

Name: Food Services and Drinking Place
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the preparation of meals, snacks, and beverages to customer order for immediate on-premise and off-premise consumption. Some provide food and drink only; while others may provide seating, waiter/waitress service, and incidental amenities, such as limited entertainment. Food and beverage services at hotels and motels; amusement parks, theaters, casinos, country clubs, and similar recreational facilities. Civic and social organizations are included only if these services are provided by a separate establishment primarily engaged in providing food and beverage services. Excluded are establishments operating dinner cruises and scenic and sightseeing transportation.

Name: Full Service Restaurant
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services to patrons who order and are served while seated (e.g., waiter/waitress service) and pay after eating. May also provide other services, such as takeout services. May be stand-alone facilities or may be attached to another facility (e.g., hotel).

Name: Limited-Service Eating Place
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services where patrons generally order or select items and pay before eating. Most establishments do not have waiter/waitress service. Includes carry out restaurants, delicatessen restaurants, fast food restaurants, pizzerias, sandwich shops, cafeterias, snack bars, ice cream stands, doughnut shops, mobile food service vehicles, and similar facilities.

Name: Limited-Service Restaurant
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services (except snack and non-alcoholic beverage bars) where patrons generally order or select items and pay before eating. Food and drink may be consumed on premises, taken out, or delivered to the customers' location. Some establishments in this industry may provide these food services in combination with the selling of alcoholic beverages.

Name: Cafeteria
Description: Establishments, known as cafeterias, buffets, or grill buffets, primarily engaged in preparing and serving meals for immediate consumption using cafeteria-style or buffet serving equipment, such as steam tables, refrigerated areas, display grills, and self-service non-alcoholic beverage dispensing equipment. Patrons select from food and drink items on display in a continuous cafeteria line or from buffet stations.

Name: Animal Exhibition - Fair
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services at an animal exhibition - fair.

Name: Commissary Operations
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services at a commissary.

Name: Fast Food
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing fast food services.

Name: Food Exhibition - Fair
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services at a food exhibition - fair.

Name: Hospital Kitchen
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services at a hospital kitchen.

Name: Independent Food Service
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing independent food services.

Name: Institutional
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing institutional food services.

Name: School Kitchen
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing school kitchen food services.

Name: Snack and Non-Alcoholic Beverage Bar
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in (1) preparing and/or serving a specialty snack, such as ice cream, frozen yogurt, cookies, or popcorn or (2) serving non-alcoholic beverages, such as coffee, juices, or sodas for consumption on or near the premises. These establishments may carry and sell a combination of snack, non-alcoholic beverage, and other related products (e.g., coffee beans, mugs, coffee makers) but generally promote and sell a unique snack or non-alcoholic beverage.

Name: Special Food Services
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services at one or more of the following locations: (1) the customers' location; (2) a location designated by the customer; or (3) from motorized vehicles or non-motorized carts.

Name: Food Service Contractor
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services at institutional, governmental, commercial, or industrial locations based on contractual arrangements with these types of organizations for a specified period of time. The establishments of this industry provide food services for the convenience of the contracting organization or the contracting organizations' customers. The contractual arrangement of these establishments may vary based on the type of facility operated (e.g., cafeteria, restaurant, fast-food eating place), revenue sharing structure, cost structure, and the staffing. Management staff is always provided by the food service contractor.

Name: Caterer
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing single event-based food services. These establishments generally have equipment and vehicles to transport meals and snacks to events and/or prepare food at an off-premise site. Banquet halls with catering staff are included in this industry. Examples of events catered by establishments in this industry are graduation parties, wedding receptions, business or retirement luncheons, and trade shows.

Name: Mobile Food Service
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in preparing and serving meals and snacks for immediate consumption from motorized vehicles or non-motorized carts. The establishment is the central location from which the caterer route is serviced, not each vehicle or cart. Included in this industry are establishments primarily engaged in providing food services from vehicles, such as hot dog carts and ice cream trucks.

Name: Drinking Place (Alcoholic Beverages)
Description: Facilities serving alcoholic beverages and with regular live entertainment and/or dancing.

Name: Agriculture and Food Supporting Facility
Description: Facilities providing supporting services to agriculture and food establishments.

Name: Agricultural Chemical Manufacturing
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing chemicals for agricultural activities; includes fertilizers, pesticides, and other chemicals.

Name: Fertilizer
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in one or more of the following: (1) manufacturing nitrogenous or phosphatic fertilizer materials; (2) manufacturing fertilizers from sewage or animal waste; (3) manufacturing nitrogenous or phosphatic materials and mixing with other ingredients into fertilizers; and (4) mixing ingredients made elsewhere into fertilizers.

Name: Organic
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing organic fertilizers.

Name: Inert Chemical
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing inert chemical fertilizers.

Name: Pesticide
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the formulation and preparation of agricultural and household pest control chemicals (except fertilizers).

Name: Poultry
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing pesticides for use in poultry.

Name: Livestock
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing pesticides for use in livestock.

Name: Veterinary Pharmaceutical Manufacturing
Description: Establishments engaged in the manufacturing of pharmaceuticals for use in animals.

Name: Nutrients
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing nutrients for animal use.

Name: Product Manufacturing
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing nutrient products for animal use.

Name: Antibiotic Drug
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing antibiotic drugs for animal use.

Name: Product Manufacturing
Description: Establishments engaged in manufacturing antibiotic drug products for animal use.

Name: Farm Supply Wholesaler
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in the merchant wholesale distribution of farm supplies, such as animal feeds, fertilizers, agricultural chemicals, pesticides, plant seeds, and plant bulbs.

Name: Farm Animal Feed Distribution
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in farm animal feed distribution.

Name: Genetics Supply
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in genetics supply.

Name: Farm Supply Retailer
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in retailing farm supplies.

Name: Farm Animal Feed Distribution
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in farm animal feed distribution.

Name: Distribution Warehouse - Feed
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in distribution of feed from a warehouse.

Name: Distribution Warehouse - Feed Additives
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in distribution of feed additives from a warehouse.

Name: Distribution Warehouse - Poultry Feed
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in distribution of poultry feed from a warehouse.

Name: Veterinary Service
Description: Establishments engaged in the practice of veterinary medicine, dentistry, or surgery for animals.

Name: Veterinary Drug Distribution
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in veterinary drug distribution.

Name: Distribution Warehouse - Veterinary Drugs
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in distribution of veterinary drugs from a warehouse.

Name: Farm Seed Stock Distribution
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in farm seed stock distribution.

Name: Distribution Warehouse
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in warehouse storage and distribution of farm seed stock.

Name: Seed Stock Operations
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in seed stock operations.

Name: Agricultural Testing Laboratory
Description: Establishments conducting soil, seed, plant, animal and related testing.

Name: Plant and Crop Testing Laboratory
Description: Laboratories engaged in conducting plant and crop testing.

Name: Commercial Laboratory
Description: Commercial laboratories engaged in conducting plant and crop testing.

Name: Government Laboratory
Description: Government laboratories engaged in conducting plant and crop testing.

Name: Academic Institution Laboratory
Description: Academic laboratories engaged in conducting plant and crop testing.

Name: Dairy
Description: Laboratories engaged in conducting dairy product testing.

Name: Animal Testing Laboratory
Description: Laboratories engaged in conducting animal testing.

Name: Commercial Laboratory
Description: Commercial laboratories engaged in conducting animal testing.

Name: Government Laboratory
Description: Government laboratories engaged in conducting animal testing.

Name: Academic Institution Laboratory
Description: Academic laboratories engaged in conducting animal testing.

Name: Agricultural and Food Research
Description: Establishments engaged in conducting research and experimental development in agricultural and food sciences.

Name: Plant and Crop Research Facility
Description: Establishments engaged in conducting plant and crop research.

Name: Commercial Research
Description: Commercial facilities engaged in conducting plant and crop research.

Name: Government Research
Description: Academic facilities engaged in conducting plant and crop research.

Name: Academic Research
Description: Government facilities engaged in conducting plant and crop research.

Name: Animal Research Facility
Description: Establishments engaged in conducting animal research.

Name: Commercial Research
Description: Commercial facilities engaged in conducting animal research.

Name: Government Research
Description: Government facilities engaged in conducting animal research.

Name: Academic Research
Description: Academic facilities engaged in conducting animal research.

Name: Farm Production Support Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing farm production support activities.

Name: Crop Production Support Facility
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing a soil preparation activity or crop production service, such as plowing, fertilizing, seed bed preparation, planting, cultivating, and crop protecting services.

Name: Cotton Ginning
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing support activities for cotton ginning.

Name: Crop Harvesting, Primarily by Machine
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in mechanical harvesting, picking, and combining of crops, and related activities. The machinery used is provided by the servicing establishment.

Name: Postharvest Crop Activities (Except Cotton Ginning)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing services on crops, subsequent to their harvest, with the intent of preparing them for market or further processing. These establishments provide post-harvest activities, such as crop cleaning, sun drying, shelling, fumigating, curing, sorting, grading, packing, and cooling.

Name: Genetics/Reproduction
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing support activities for genetics/reproduction.

Name: Animal Production Support Facilities
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to raising livestock (e.g., cattle, goats, hogs, horses, poultry, and sheep). These establishments may perform one or more of the following: (1) breeding services for animals, including companion animals (e.g., cats, dogs, pet birds); (2) pedigree record services; (3) boarding horses; (4) dairy herd improvement activities; (5) livestock spraying; and (6) sheep dipping and shearing.

Name: Genetics/Reproduction
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to genetics/reproduction.

Name: Animal Care (Includes Grooming and Boarding)
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to animal care (includes grooming and boarding).

Name: Hoof Care/Ferrier Service
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to hoof care/ferrier service.

Name: Veterinary Service
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to veterinary service.

Name: Showing and Training
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to showing and training.

Name: Insect and Pest Control
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to insect and pest control.

Name: Record Services/Animal Identification
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in performing support activities related to record services/animal identification.

Name: Regulatory, Oversight, or Industry Organization
Description: Facilities associated with organizations that provide technical, operation, pricing, and business oversight and support to the Agriculture and Food Sector.

Name: Federal Agriculture and Food Agency
Description: Facilities associated with federal agencies that deal with the agriculture and food system, including Department of Agriculture, Food and Drug Administration, and others.  Includes federal extension services.

Name: State, Local, Regional Agriculture and Food Agency
Description: Facilities associated with state, local, and regional agencies dealing with agriculture and food in their jurisdiction, including public health departments, agricultural extension services, and others.

Name: Agriculture and Food Industry Organization
Description: Facilities associated with industry organizations (e.g., farmers associations, ranchers associations) that provide industry-wide support.

Name: International Agriculture and Food Organization
Description: Facilities associated with international organizations dealing with agriculture and food issues.

Name: Other Agriculture and Food
Description: Agriculture and food facilities and assets not elsewhere categorized.

Name: Banking and Finance
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in financial transactions (transactions involving the creation, liquidation, or change in ownership of financial assets) and/or in facilitating financial transactions. Includes banking and credit establishments, securities and commodities establishments, insurance establishments, and other financial establishments.

Name: Banking and Credit
Description: Establishments that lend funds raised from depositors, lend funds raised from credit market borrowing or facilitate the lending of funds or issuance of credit.

Name: Federal Reserve System
Description: Central bank of the United States, to include the Board of Governors and 12 Regional Reserve Banks.

Name: Federal Reserve Headquarters
Description: The headquarters of the Federal Reserve.

Name: Depository Credit Institution
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in accepting deposits (or share deposits) and lending funds from these deposits.

Name: Commercial Bank
Description: Establishments primarily engaged in accepting demand and other deposits and making commercial, industrial, and consumer loans. Commercial banks and branches of foreign banks are included.

Name: Bank Office Building
Description: Facilities holding the administrative office of the institution. Includes operations centers, data and information systems, and telecommunication systems.

Name: Bank Customer Service Facility
